title: Ionisation energy
summary: 9701 AS — first ionisation energy trends and explanations.
learningObjectives: Describe trends across Period 3 and Group 2.

simpleExplanation.title: Energy to remove an electron
simpleExplanation.summary: Ionisation energy measures how tightly the nucleus holds outer electrons. Trends reveal periodic patterns.

sections.content: **Ionisation energy** (1.4) is core **periodicity** evidence. Always explain with **nuclear charge, radius, and shielding**.
